LanguageData.LBD_Dragon_Fall.questDescriptionRules.ru: questDescription->A mysterious figure has fallen from the sky near your colony. It appears to be a young girl, radiating the ominous energy of Miraboreasu.
A dark shadow has crashed near the colony—it seems to be a young girl. Despite the lack of any protection, she survived the impact and is currently unconscious.\n\nPerhaps you should go and investigate? It feels as if the legendary Miraboreasu has descended.
